weight_basis: Observed hourly boarding and alighting volumes over the 14-day observation period, aggregated by stop and hour and converted to relative weights.
notes: The processed values used by the simulation are included in Demand.xlsx. Individual raw stop-query files are not required for simulation execution.

source_dataset: Campus stakeholder heuristic estimates
spatial_inclusion_rule: Twenty major campus activity locations added because they were not represented as public transit stops.
weight_basis: Hour- and direction-specific relative demand scores estimated from the practical experience of campus-affiliated stakeholders familiar with local travel patterns.
notes: Not derived from TCBIS. Coordinates identify campus activity locations; hourly boarding and alighting scores were combined with observed stop data before normalization.
